channel.title: PNallDR
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from PNallDR, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Obama-Appointed Judge Refers Trump Team to Bar for Discipline
Trump Reinstates Iran Blockade, Claims US Control Over Hormuz Strait
European Nations Continue Funding Russia’s War Despite NATO Buildup
item.description: Shipping data reveals European countries spent billions in early 2026 on Arctic liquefied natural gas purchases from Russia.

item.title: Bruce Pearl Urges Congress to Honor Graham with Bipartisan Cooperation
item.description: Congress should honor the late Sen. Lindsey Graham by adopting the bipartisan approach that defined his career, Pearl told Newsmax.
